---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability, agent, or skill
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What's missing or painful today.

**Proposed change**
What you want. Affected pipeline phase (init / plan / design / breakdown / execute) and component (skill, agent, script, hook, workflow).

**Alternatives considered**
What else you tried or evaluated.

**Out of scope**
What this proposal explicitly does not cover.
